category_sources: source_facts.description says cdecl turns English phrases into C or C++ declarations; official README describes composing and deciphering C/C++ declarations and casts.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cdecl; official repository README title is cdecl and says the GitHub repository is the official site for versions 3.0 and later.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the documented official site and includes usage examples and feature documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provided as https://github.com/paul-j-lucas/cdecl; per instruction, repo returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists cdecl and c++decl; official README topics include c, cplusplus, developer-tools, and cdecl.
